title: Pay-to-Witness-Script-Hash (P2WSH)
description: SegWit version-0 output that commits to the SHA256 hash of a witness script and reveals that script plus its witness stack when spent. P2WSH supports complex policies such as multisig with lower weight and no legacy scriptSig malleability.

resources.title: BIP 141: Pay-to-Witness-Script-Hash
resources.notes: Canonical definition of the v0 witness script hash program and witness validation.

resources.title: Bitcoin Wiki: Address
resources.notes: Address-level explanation of native SegWit P2WSH outputs.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Explains witness scripts, native SegWit multisig, and P2WSH spending structure.
